message:
fix(ui): Add ACFS_TEAL color to gum_ui.sh

The services-setup.sh script uses ACFS_TEAL but it wasn't defined
in gum_ui.sh, causing an unbound variable error during installation:
  "line 1156: ACFS_TEAL: unbound variable"

Added ACFS_TEAL (#94e2d5, Catppuccin Mocha teal) to the color scheme
so all scripts sourcing gum_ui.sh get access to it.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,6 +19,7 @@ ACFS_ERROR="#f38ba8"      # Red
 ACFS_MUTED="#6c7086"      # Gray
 ACFS_ACCENT="#cba6f7"     # Purple
 ACFS_PINK="#f5c2e7"       # Pink
+ACFS_TEAL="#94e2d5"       # Teal - highlights
 
 # ASCII Art Banner for ACFS
 print_banner() {
